title: Fishy's Netherite
description: I basically added gold and diamond highlights to netherite.
body:
I basically added gold and diamond highlights to netherite.


there are a few netherite block textures you can switch between. not on my default

Navigate to assets/minecraft/textures/block

then select a texture and rename it to "netherite_block.png"

reload the respourcepack using f3+t
